name: Gari
description: Gari (ガリ, Gari) was a famed Iwagakure shinobi and a member of the Explosion Corps along with Deidara.  Gari is able to use Explosion Release, a kekkei genkai that allows him to combine two unknown chakra natures to utilise explosive chakra, as seen when he used Explosion Release: Landmine Fist to obliterate an Allied Shinobi ninja simply by punching him.  Manga Debut: Chapter #515 Anime Debut: Naruto Shippuuden Episode #256  (Source: Narutopedia)
